meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling. Learn how to generate passive income streams by overcoming the 'no project ideas' trap using Antigravity and Claude Code for rapid MVP launch.
content.answer_block: The 'no project ideas' paralysis ends by shifting focus from 'innovation' to 'utility.' Identify high-intent search queries in niche SaaS markets, build a micro-SaaS wrapper around an existing API, and deploy using automated AI tools. This converts technical energy into recurring revenue by solving specific, boring, profitable problems.
content.intro:
The screen is blank. Your cursor blinks with mocking precision, a digital metronome counting down the time you're wasting not shipping. You have the technical stack, you have the ambition, but you are paralyzed by the 'blank page' syndrome. Most founders fail here, waiting for a lightning bolt of genius that never strikes.

True wealth isn't built on world-changing ideas; it's built on boring, predictable utility. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for intelligent execution, you can bypass the 'ideation' phase entirely. We aren't looking for the next unicorn; we are looking for the next reliable paycheck. Let's turn that hesitation into a deployed, revenue-generating asset.

steps.title: Identify a High-Pain Niche
steps.description: Don't brainstorm. Scrape forums like Reddit or niche Discord servers for people complaining about manual tasks. If they are complaining, they are willing to pay for a fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these common pain points from [input_data] and identify 3 micro-SaaS opportunities that require less than 48 hours to build.
steps.claude_code_command: claude search 'manual task automation ideas for [niche]'

steps.title: Architect the MVP Structure
steps.description: Keep it lean. You need a landing page, a payment gateway (Stripe), and a core function. Antigravity will scaffold the boilerplate so you don't touch CSS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Next.js project structure with Tailwind CSS, Supabase authentication, and a Stripe integration for a subscription-based micro-SaaS.

steps.title: Develop the Core Utility
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write the logic that solves the actual problem identified in Step 1. Focus on the 'one thing' it does well.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API route that processes [input_data] using OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini to produce [desired_output]. Ensure robust error handling.

steps.title: Implement Automated Billing
steps.description: If the user can't pay, it's a hobby, not a business. Hook up Stripe webhooks to handle subscription states automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Stripe webhook handler that updates the user's subscription status in the Supabase database upon successful payment.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Ship it. Use Vercel or Railway for immediate hosting. Perfectionism is the enemy of profit; deploy now, optimize later.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide the configuration settings and environment variable requirements for deploying this project to Vercel.

pro_tips: Target 'Boring' B2B: High-ticket enterprise users pay more for boring automation than consumers pay for 'cool' apps.
The 48-Hour Rule: If you can't build the MVP in 48 hours, the scope is too broad. Slice it in half.
Audit Your Stack: Use Antigravity to keep dependencies minimal; every extra library is a future security debt.
SEO is Your Sales Team: Use Claude Code to generate landing page copy based on high-volume, low-competition keywords.
Monetize the 'No': If a user requests a feature you don't have, charge them for it or move on. Don't build for free.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, spend 80% of your time on distribution. Reach out to the users who expressed the pain point in Step 1 and offer them a 30-day free trial in exchange for a testimonial.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect moment. The market rewards those who ship, not those who dream. Your next revenue stream is waiting for you to build it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
